description.plain: Woody Ginger (inspired by Tom Ford's Tom Ford for Men) opens with a fizzy ginger and pepper duet, progressively softening with violet and orange blossoms. However, the key personality of the fragrance is all about the woods. Most prominently, cedarwood is enhanced by tobacco and patchouli, and then reinforced by the earthy accent of cypriol roots, an Indian plant used to perfume traditional clothes. Woody Ginger (our impression of Tom Ford's Tom Ford for Men) is a refined and assertive masculine fragrance, bringing together ingredients with a strong personality in an innovative composition that is all about harmony.
